meta_description: WealthX 2.1 brings Smart Budget, Goal Tracker, and a complete product gallery so you can review the latest finance workflows before downloading.
meta_keywords: WealthX, personal finance, smart budget, goal tracker, budgeting, bookkeeping, investment, iCloud
title: WealthX 2.1 — Smart Budget, Goal Tracker, and a Full Product Gallery
hero_subtitle: WealthX 2.1 adds Smart Budget, Goal Tracker, and a full visual walkthrough of the app’s latest workflows.
v2_subtitle: Smarter budget guidance, dedicated saving goals, and a shared screenshot gallery that shows the real product flow.
v2_feature1_desc: See budget suggestions based on recent spending trends, progress, and inactive categories that can be cleaned up.
v2_feature2_desc: Create savings goals with target amount, due date, and linked accounts, then follow progress from one detail view.
v2_feature3_desc: Browse the latest app screenshots across accounts, budgeting, bookkeeping, insights, flows, data transfer, widgets, and investing.
features_subtitle: Review the current WealthX workflows by module. The same screenshot set is shared across every web language version.
card_accounts_desc: Create, edit, swipe, and link accounts with one consolidated gallery.
card_budget_goals_desc: Budget creation, smart suggestions, and the new Goal Tracker live side by side in v2.1.
card_bookkeeping_desc: Normal entries, transfers, recurring transactions, and refunds are all shown with fresh screenshots.
card_insights_scenarios_desc: Show trend analysis, map views, pie charts, and scenario switching in one place.
card_flows_widgets_desc: Reusable flows and home-screen widgets help daily execution stay quick.
card_data_investing_desc: Import, export, and investing workflows now sit in the same customer-facing gallery.
details_subtitle: Every gallery below uses the latest shared screenshot set from the app. English and Simplified Chinese are active; other languages stay as placeholders on the web for later automation.
details_note: Screenshots switch between light and dark variants when you change the page theme.
details_accounts_desc: WealthX keeps account structure visible from the first screen, then lets you edit balances, swipe for quick actions, and manage grouped accounts without leaving the flow.
details_accounts_point1: Create account groups or standalone accounts from the same entry point.
details_accounts_point2: Update balances and notes directly inside account detail.
details_accounts_point3: Use swipe actions and link management to keep the structure clean over time.
details_budget_goals_desc: Version 2.1 combines classic budget management with Smart Budget suggestions and a dedicated Goal Tracker so planning and progress live together.
details_budget_goals_point1: Manage monthly, yearly, and project budgets from one workspace.
details_budget_goals_point2: Review Smart Budget suggestions before adjusting or archiving budget items.
details_budget_goals_point3: Track saving goals with target amount, due date, linked accounts, and progress detail.
details_budget_goals_image_alt: WealthX budget and goal tracker screenshots
details_bookkeeping_desc: Daily bookkeeping stays flexible across standard transactions, transfers, recurring entries, and refund or return handling.
details_bookkeeping_point1: Start from the Today screen and move between transaction types without leaving the entry flow.
details_bookkeeping_point2: Recurring logic helps repeated bills and income stay predictable.
details_bookkeeping_point3: Refund actions are available from transaction shortcuts and detail screens.
details_insights_scenarios_desc: Charts and scenario switching work together so customers can see both the current result and the planning context behind it.
details_insights_scenarios_point1: Review overview, map, trend, and pie perspectives from the same statistics area.
details_insights_scenarios_point2: Use scenarios to compare alternate plans without rebuilding your structure.
details_insights_scenarios_point3: Keep customer-facing visuals focused on drift, allocation, and cashflow movement.
details_flows_widgets_desc: Reusable flows reduce repeated input, and widgets keep important actions and summaries visible before the app is opened.
details_flows_widgets_point1: Create and manage flow templates for repeated actions.
details_flows_widgets_point2: Launch quick-entry paths from the app and the home screen.
details_flows_widgets_point3: Pair flows with widgets to shorten the gap between planning and execution.
details_data_investing_title: Data + Investing: Bring More of Your Finance Stack In
details_data_investing_desc: The website now shows the current import, export, and investment views instead of the older 2.0 poster images.
details_data_investing_point1: Import and export workflows keep data portable.
details_data_investing_point2: Investment screens cover overview, data source, deposit or withdraw, and buy or sell actions.
details_data_investing_point3: These screenshots now match the app tips catalog instead of the older marketing set.
details_data_investing_image_alt: WealthX data transfer and investment screenshots
privacy_subtitle: Your data stays with you — stored locally or in iCloud.
privacy_item3: Icons you choose (emoji, SF Symbols, custom images).
privacy_item4: iCloud sync (optional) via your own iCloud account.
privacy_use1: To provide and improve app features.
privacy_use2: To keep data consistent across devices.
privacy_share_p: We do not sell or share your data. Disclosure only when legally required.
privacy_storage_p: Data is stored locally or in iCloud (optional), protected by Apple system security.
